pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 81 defines opp_name = 'Office Design Project - Azure Interior'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 10 defines PROPOSAL_PATH=/home/ga/Documents/Proposals/Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf; export_result.sh line 61 confirms target_filename = Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf

Web search: Odoo CRM documentation confirms 'Proposition' is a standard default stage in Odoo CRM pipelines. Result: 'The Community version of Odoo 18 ERP CRM pipeline stages usually includes default stages like New, Qualified, Proposition, and Won.'
Code analysis: verifier.py line 31 confirms target_prob = metadata.get('target_probability', 70.0); verifier.py line 63 checks if abs(actual_prob - target_prob) < 0.1

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Odoo CRM opportunity named 'Office Design Project - Azure Interior' with an expected revenue of $56,000. A PDF proposal (Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf) is dynamically generated during setup with scope and pricing details. The opportunity must be moved to the 'Proposition' stage, which is a standard stage in Odoo CRM pipelines. The probability target is 70%. All metadata values are accurate and verified against the task setup code and Odoo CRM documentation.
